---
title: "Modelling Approach"
---

## Overview

This page will document the modelling strategy: traffic estimation, temporal
profiles, and exposure-adjusted collision risk scoring.

::: {.callout-note}
Placeholder page. The final version should pull from the model results and
collision-model EDA notebooks.
:::

## Planned Content

- Stage 1a: AADT estimation for uncounted road links.
- Stage 1b: temporal profiles from WebTRIS.
- Stage 2: Poisson GLM and XGBoost collision models.
- Exposure offset and interpretation of excess risk.
- Risk percentiles, residuals, and confidence tiers.
